content: [P2-1] Fix routes.py: Add missing imports (datetime, BaseModel) and fix type annotations
[P2-2] Fix gmail_service.py: Add missing imports and fix ensure_labels_exist error handling
[P2-3] Fix classifier.py: Add error handling for API failures and improve prompt
[P2-4] Add toast notifications to frontend for user feedback
[P2-5] Add retry logic for Gmail API calls and improve error handling
[P2-6] Add progress tracking for scan operations
[P2-7] Add missing UI components (toast, sonner integration)
[P2-8] Add deployment script and update README
